# Subcommand help must show the human-readable category, not the internal
# numeric sort-prefix. Categories are stored as "20\x1fSECRETS" (the \x1f is
# invisible in a terminal, so a raw render looks like "20SECRETS"); the help
# templates must strip the prefix.

exec sesam status -h
stdout '(?m)^CATEGORY:$'
# The line must be exactly the trimmed name - the buggy render was "   20…SECRETS".
stdout '(?m)^   SECRETS$'
! stdout '(?m)^   [0-9]'
